params.description: Model-specific parameters. Omitted params use their defaults. See model definition for available options.

items.description: Output file format: 'step' (raw STEP), 'stpz' (gzip-compressed STEP), 'decomposed-mesh' (triangulated JSON), 'gltf' (glTF 2.0 binary .glb). Note: 'step' and 'stpz' are mutually exclusive — choose one or the other, not both.
items.title: OutputFormat

formats.description: Output formats to generate. Multiple formats can be requested (e.g. ['gltf', 'stpz']) — each produces a separate downloadable result. Do not include both 'step' and 'stpz' — only one STEP variant is supported per request.

meshPrecision.description: Tessellation precision for mesh-based outputs (decomposed-mesh and gltf). Lower values produce denser meshes. Only ignored when output is limited to step/stpz formats.
meshPrecision.title: MeshPrecision

gltfMeshPrecision.description: Override tessellation precision specifically for glTF output. When set, takes precedence over meshPrecision for glTF only.
gltfMeshPrecision.title: MeshPrecision

adjustYtoZ.description: Convert from Y-up to Z-up coordinate system in the output. Useful for software that expects Z-up.

outputs.description: Controls which output formats are generated and their quality settings
outputs.title: OutputOptions

schema.description: Submit a parametric model for generation with specified parameters and output formats
schema.title: ModelSubmissionBody
